arts.ttl: Chelsea XI vs Fulham – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea make the short trip to Craven Cottage to take on West London rivals Fulham this weekend. Enzo Maresca has insisted that he is confident in Chelsea’s progress despite a recent dip in form. The Blues reached the Europa Conference League semi-finals on Thursday despite defeat at home to Legia Warsaw. arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano announces Dean Huijsen transfer amid Arsenal, Chelsea, Liverpool and Real Madrid links
arts.sum: Real Madrid have been heavily linked with Huijsen, and it appears to be his dream move, but Los Blancos have yet to decide whether they will actually look to add a centre-back this summer, which has given Premier League clubs an advantage. Fabrizio Romano has confirmed that Dean Huijsen will likely stay in the Premier League this summer.
